card.label: TaM departures
card.incomplete_detail: Choose a stop, line and destination in the visual editor.
card.no_departures_detail: The feed may be temporarily empty or service may have ended.
card.rate_limited: The public API is limiting requests. A new attempt will be made automatically.
card.stale_detail: The current refresh failed; these departures may be outdated.
card.ambiguous_line: Several lines ({lines}) match. Open the editor and select a line.
card.line_not_found: No line matches this journey. Open the editor and select a line.

editor.catalog_error: The catalogue could not be loaded. You can retry or enter values manually.
editor.manual_hint: Values are matched case-insensitively when possible. Check spelling if no result appears.
editor.ambiguous_line: Several lines ({lines}) match. Select a line.
